NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY SERIAN, ROBERT B
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR LETICIA BRAN'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. $100 PER MONTH SHALL BE WITHHELD FROM DEFENDANT'S EARNINGS. DEFENDANT HAS ESTABLISHED THAT THE REMAINDER OF HER INCOME IS NECESSARY FOR THE SUPPORT OF HERSELF AND HER FAMILY. (THE COURT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER AND SERVE IT ON ALL PARTIES.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR# 5976.(302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos.
Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling, which was not contested. Defendant/Judgment Debtor Leticia Bran's Claim Of Exemption is granted in part. $100 per month shall be withheld from Defendant's earnings. Defendant has established that the remainder of her income is necessary for the support of herself and her family. (The Court shall prepare the order and serve it on all parties.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
